title: Synthetic Result Policy Check
description: Schema for a synthetic result policy check result. Dry-lab only — does not measure biological activity.

current_level.description: Current proof-ladder level of the candidate.

proposed_level.description: Proposed proof-ladder level for the candidate.

evidence_source.description: Source of the evidence for the proposed level.

policy_pass.description: Whether the proposal passes the synthetic result policy.

violation.description: Description of the policy violation, if any.

dry_lab_only.description: Always true. This is a computational assessment, not biological proof.
